component.name: ContentLoopScene
component.script:
sub init() ' Enough duplicate observers to exceed the JS stack via re-entrant dispatch. m.observerCount = 1200 m.count = 0
m.content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") m.top.itemContent = m.content
for i = 0 to m.observerCount - 1 m.top.observeField("itemContent", "onItemContent") end for
print "Observer registrations:"; m.observerCount runRepro() end sub
sub runRepro() print "Triggering ContentNode title update" m.content.title = "start" print "Callbacks fired:"; m.count end sub
sub onItemContent(event as Object) m.count = m.count + 1 m.content.title = "t-" + m.count.toStr() end sub
